_publications._publicationTitle: Expanding the Noonan spectrum/RASopathy NGS panel: Benefits of adding NF1 and SPRED1.

_contextSnippet: Adding NF1 and SPRED1 to the panel increased the diagnostic yield from 23.5% (119/505) to 25.7% (130/505).
details: Adding NF1 and SPRED1 to the panel increased diagnostic yield from 23.5% (119/505) to 25.7% (130/505)
